title: Querying App Subscription with api returns 403 Forbidden

posts.author: twar (Tomasz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am reading api documentation → App Subscription and sending query about app subscription is first which does not work.
With this example query:

query {
  app_subscription {
    billing_period
    days_left
    is_trial
    plan_id
    renewal_date
  }
}

I get:

403 Forbidden
{"error_code":"UserUnauthroizedException","status_code":403,"error_message":"User unauthorized to perform action","error_data":{}}

maybe this is because I have 14 days trial right now? Or is this something completely different?

posts.author: twar (Tomasz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since I can’t see any option to edit original post then I’ll try give new information here.
This probably has changed

monday API docs

Error codes

Our monday.com GraphQL API returns the set of predefined errors listed below. If an exception is handled by the GraphQL application later, it will return a 200 status code and further information in the three following structures: Check out this code...

and now api returns 403 instead.
Am I right?
